description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a matte black and tan color scheme, featuring a polymer adjustable stock and pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The rifle has a long, vented handguard with a rail system for mounting accessories, and a detachable box magazine inserted into the magwell. Both front and rear flip-up iron sights are mounted on the top rail, providing basic aiming capability. The barrel is of standard length and ends with a flash hider, which helps reduce visible muzzle flash during firing. The overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and polymer, typical of contemporary urban rifles. Two rifle cartridges are visible beside the rifle, indicating its intended ammunition type.
description: A modern black and tan tactical rifle with an adjustable stock, rail system, detachable magazine, and flip-up iron sights. The barrel is fitted with a flash hider, and two cartridges are shown beside it.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, flash hider, and the alignment of the handguard; two cartridges are visible to the right.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full profile, including the adjustable stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, and both flip-up iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock and the back of the receiver; two cartridges are visible to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the magazine and handguard details.
